{"society_power": 5.0, "state_power": 4.5, "society_change": 1.5, "state_change": -2.0, "key_event": "Economic collapse and rise of ZCTU/MMD opposition", "reasoning": "Copper collapse, debt, IMF dependence, food riots, coup plots, and hollowed parastatals sharply eroded state capacity and legitimacy, while urban labor (ZCTU/Chiluba) and the 1990 MMD coalition of unions, churches, and business revitalized an autonomous civil society that decisively pressured the one-party state."}
